name: Turkey Apple Hash
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces Boneless Skinless Turkey Breast, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large nonstick saucepan over medium-high heat for 30 seconds.
2. Add olive oil and heat for an additional 30 seconds.
3. Stir in onion and cook, stirring constantly, until soft, about 5-6 minutes.
4. Add turkey and continue cooking until browned on all sides.
5. Stir in apples, potatoes, cider or juice, and fennel seeds (if using). Partially cover and cook, stirring occasionally, until apples are soft and turkey is cooked through, about 5 minutes.
6. Sprinkle with black pepper.
Serving size: approximately 3/4 cup
This recipe is really good!
Nutrition:
Calories: 210
Fat: 3g
Carbohydrates: 27g
Cholesterol: 44mg
Fiber: 3g
Protein: 19g
Sodium: 41mg
